title: Sandbox – Session & Runtime Management

classes.name: SandboxRuntimeSessionManager
classes.description: Manages lifecycle of sandbox sessions across multiple agents for a single run. Handles create/resume/cleanup, concurrency, resume-state serialization.

classes.name: _SandboxSessionResources
classes.description: Wraps a BaseSandboxSession + optional client with owned-lifecycle semantics (start/stop/shutdown/delete).

classes.name: _SandboxConcurrencyGuard
classes.description: Dataclass. Prevents concurrent reuse of the same SandboxAgent across runs.

classes.name: _LiveSessionManifestUpdate
classes.description: Frozen dataclass. Result of diffing a live session's manifest against new capabilities.

classes.name: Instrumentation
classes.description: Delivers sandbox audit events to configured EventSinks with per-sink payload policies. Supports sync/async/best_effort delivery modes and ChainedSink.

classes.name: EventPayloadPolicy
classes.description: Controls how much sensitive/large data is included in sandbox audit events.

classes.name: SandboxSessionEventBase
classes.description: Shared fields for all sandbox audit events.

classes.name: SandboxSessionFinishEvent
classes.description: Finish-phase audit event with outcome, duration, optional exec output.

classes.name: WorkspacePathPolicy
classes.description: Validates and formats paths relative to a sandbox workspace root. Prevents path escape attacks.

free_functions.name: prepare_sandbox_agent
free_functions.signature: (*, agent: SandboxAgent[TContext], session: BaseSandboxSession, capabilities: Sequence[Capability], run_config_model: str | Model | None) -> Agent[TContext]
free_functions.description: Clones SandboxAgent with merged instructions, capability tools, and model settings. Calls set_public_agent() to track the original.

free_functions.name: build_sandbox_instructions
free_functions.signature: (*, base_instructions, additional_instructions, capabilities, manifest: Manifest) -> Callable[..., Awaitable[str | None]]
free_functions.description: Returns async callable that assembles: base prompt + agent instructions + per-capability fragments + remote-mount policy + filesystem tree.

free_functions.name: prepare_sandbox_input
free_functions.description: Passes list-form input through each capability's process_context().

free_functions.name: resolve_sandbox_model_name
free_functions.signature: (*, agent: SandboxAgent, run_config_model: str | Model | None) -> str | None
free_functions.description: Resolves effective model name: run_config > agent.model > default_model.

free_functions.name: clone_capabilities
free_functions.description: Deep-clones capability list to avoid shared state across agents.

free_functions.name: validate_sandbox_session_event
free_functions.description: Parses raw dict/JSON into discriminated SandboxSessionEvent via Pydantic TypeAdapter.

key_relationships: SandboxRuntimeSessionManager aggregates _SandboxSessionResources (1..* keyed by agent id)
_SandboxSessionResources depends_on BaseSandboxClient (optional, for delete on cleanup)
SandboxRuntimeSessionManager depends_on SandboxAgent (per-agent identity and manifest)
Instrumentation uses EventPayloadPolicy (composites default + per-op overrides)
WorkspacePathPolicy standalone utility used by session internals for path validation
important_notes: SandboxRuntimeSessionManager is the central lifecycle coordinator: acquire -> ensure_session -> cleanup.
Sessions can be CREATED (fresh via client.create), RESUMED (via client.resume from RunState), or INJECTED (pre-existing BaseSandboxSession passed in sandbox_config.session).
owns_session=False for injected sessions — cleanup does NOT stop/delete them.
Concurrency guard (_SandboxConcurrencyGuard) prevents the same SandboxAgent instance from being used in two concurrent runs.
Resume keys are stable agent-name-based strings used to map sessions across run state serialization/deserialization.
Instrumentation supports three sink modes: 'sync' (awaited, errors propagate by default), 'async' (fire-and-forget background task), 'best_effort' (background, errors always swallowed).
ChainedSink forces in-order delivery regardless of individual sink modes.
EventPayloadPolicy merges: default -> per-op override -> per-sink override (most specific wins).
WorkspacePathPolicy raises InvalidManifestPathError for absolute paths outside root or path-traversal escape attempts.
prepare_sandbox_agent clones the agent (never mutates original) and calls set_public_agent() to maintain the public/internal identity mapping.
SandboxSessionFinishEvent.stdout_bytes/stderr_bytes are excluded from Pydantic serialization; per-policy decode happens in Instrumentation._apply_policy.
